name: Over Easy Courthouse Café
overview: A web-series sitcom about three women who have endured harsh times through marriages, family and societal issues bonding through a love of cooking to seize the opportunity of owning a small café. Because of their own personal circumstances and those of the people they find themselves interacting with, the Over Easy Courthouse Café becomes a center for comedic and sometimes disastrous situations.

trailers.title: About Over Easy Courthouse Cafe Web Series
